General.Name: BHCC Holding Ltd
General.Description: BHCC Holding Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of building and construction works for public and private sectors in Singapore. The company operates through two segments, Building and Construction Works and Property Investment. It undertakes airport terminal, smart building, school, mixed-development, industrial building, hospital, high-rise building, data center, commercial building, clean room, cinema, and bus interchange projects, as well as commercial, hospitality, institutional, transport, healthcare, and residential projects. The company also engages in the leasing of industrial properties; undertaking of reinforcement concrete works; and property development activities. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Singapore. BHCC Holding Limited is a subsidiary of Huada Developments Limited.
General.Address: No. 1 Tampines North Drive 3, Singapore, Singapore, 528499
